chapter_title.en: Chapter on Injuries and Killing Between Women and Men

text: 5240 - وَ سَأَلَ جَمِيلٌ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمْرَانَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَ اَلرَّجُلِ قِصَاصٌ قَالَ "نَعَمْ فِي اَلْجِرَاحَاتِ حَتَّى يَبْلُغَ اَلثُّلُثَ سَوَاءً فَإِذَا بَلَغَ اَلثُّلُثَ سَوَاءً اِرْتَفَعَ اَلرَّجُلُ وَ سَفَلَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5240 - Jamil and Muhammad ibn Humran asked Abu Abdullah (as) about whether qiṣaṣ (retaliation in kind) applies between a woman and a man.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, in cases of wounds (jirahat) up to one-third of the compensation, they are equal. However, once it reaches one-third, the man's compensation increases, and the woman's compensation decreases."
